entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to the spotted stem borer

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The spotted stem borer pest that attacks sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to resist infestation by Chilo partellus, often based on several mechanisms

entities.name: LARVAL ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The process of first instar larvae establishing themselves in the plant whorl, which is a factor associated with resistance in some cultivars

entities.name: PLANT WHORL
entities.description: The specific part of the sorghum plant where larvae attempt to establish

entities.name: PHYSICAL PLANT FACTORS
entities.description: Physical characteristics of the plant, such as leaf shape, that influence the preferential establishment of young larvae

entities.name: CHEMICAL PLANT FACTORS
entities.description: Chemical characteristics of the plant, such as wax compounds, that influence the preferential establishment of young larvae

entities.name: ERECT LEAVES
entities.description: A physical trait of sorghum involved in the establishment of larvae

entities.name: CURLED LEAF BASES
entities.description: A physical trait of sorghum involved in the establishment of larvae

entities.name: CHEMICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The method of analyzing surface extracts to identify compounds in the wax related to resistance

entities.name: WAX COMPOUND
entities.description: A specific compound found in the plant wax whose concentration is related to resistance at the larval establishment stage

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research institution where the development of resistant sorghum cultivars is taking place
